bug.symptom: USER opens /my-adjustment-requests → '请求失败: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading findMany)'
bug.rootCause: Stale Prisma Client: dev server held old query_engine-windows.dll.node, preventing prisma generate from replacing it. prisma.scheduleAdjustmentRequest was undefined at runtime.
bug.fix: Kill dev server → prisma generate → restart. Added defensive error handling to mine/list API routes.

verification.prismaDelegateRuntimeCheck: PASS (scheduleAdjustmentRequest.findMany is a function, count returns 0)
